creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 216704
Update to PowerDNS Recursor 4.3.3

This release fixes an issue where the refresh time of a loaded RPZ zone was ignored. A DNSSEC issue that could lead to zones being marked Bogus wrongly and a few other DNSSEC related issues were also fixed.

Reworked the Lua options. You can now choose from Lua, LuaJIT and LuaJIT-openresty.

QA:
portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (12.1, amd64)
